charts.title: APP 装机量
charts.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name IN ('login_page_pageshow', 'discovery_page_pageshow')) AS app_installs FROM events
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看某段时间APP装机的总数

charts.title: APP 活跃人数
charts.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) AS app_active_users FROM events
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看某段时间APP活跃的总用户数量

charts.title: APP 新增用户人数
charts.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE event_date = (SELECT MIN(e2.event_date) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.reduser_id = events.reduser_id)) AS app_new_users FROM events
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看某段时间内 APP 的新增用户的总数量

charts.title: APP 人均使用时长
charts.sql:
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time_nano::TIMESTAMP - start_time_nano::TIMESTAMP))) / 60.0 AS app_avg_usage_duration FROM events
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: APP用户的平均使用时长，按天/周/月三个维度查看

charts.title: 核心功能渗透率
charts.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN span_name ILIKE '%ai_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%generated_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%map_map%' OR span_name ILIKE '%Map_poi%' OR span_name ILIKE '%Map_POI%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_popup_confirm%' THEN reduser_id END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0) AS core_function_penetration FROM events
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看某段时间段内核心功能使用用户占总体用户的比例（AI路书all，Porsche+页面点赞收藏，地图操作all，发起导航）

charts.title: APP 活跃用户留存率 3/7/14天

title.text: APP 活跃用户留存率 3/7/14天

charts.sql:
WITH 
    cohort AS (
        SELECT
            reduser_id,
            event_date AS cohort_date
        FROM events
        WHERE span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
        
        GROUP BY reduser_id, event_date
    ),

        DAY_3 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_3_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '3' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

        DAY_7 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_7_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '7' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

        DAY_14 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_14_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '14' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

    cohort_size AS (
        SELECT
            cohort_date,
            COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) AS cohort_users
        FROM cohort
        GROUP BY cohort_date
    )

    SELECT
        cs.cohort_date, cs.cohort_users, d3.day_3_retained, d7.day_7_retained, d14.day_14_retained
        , ROUND(CAST(day_3_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_3_rate, ROUND(CAST(day_7_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_7_rate, ROUND(CAST(day_14_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_14_rate
    FROM cohort_size cs
    LEFT JOIN DAY_3 d3 ON cs.cohort_date = d3.cohort_date
LEFT JOIN DAY_7 d7 ON cs.cohort_date = d7.cohort_date
LEFT JOIN DAY_14 d14 ON cs.cohort_date = d14.cohort_date
    ORDER BY cs.cohort_date
    
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看活跃用户在3，7，14天三个时间窗口下的留存率
data_quality_warnings: [APP 活跃用户留存率 3/7/14天] some metric values are NULL — check for division by zero or missing data

charts.title: 核心功能用户留存率 3/7/14天

title.text: 核心功能用户留存率 3/7/14天

charts.sql:
WITH 
    cohort AS (
        SELECT
            reduser_id,
            event_date AS cohort_date
        FROM events
        WHERE span_name = 'post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide_button_click'
        
        GROUP BY reduser_id, event_date
    ),

        DAY_3 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_3_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '3' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

        DAY_7 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_7_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '7' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

        DAY_14 AS (
            SELECT
                c.cohort_date,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.reduser_id) AS day_14_retained
            FROM cohort c
            INNER JOIN events e
                ON c.reduser_id = e.reduser_id
                AND e.event_date = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL '14' DAY
                AND e.span_name = 'login_page_pageshow'
            GROUP BY c.cohort_date
        ),

    cohort_size AS (
        SELECT
            cohort_date,
            COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) AS cohort_users
        FROM cohort
        GROUP BY cohort_date
    )

    SELECT
        cs.cohort_date, cs.cohort_users, d3.day_3_retained, d7.day_7_retained, d14.day_14_retained
        , ROUND(CAST(day_3_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_3_rate, ROUND(CAST(day_7_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_7_rate, ROUND(CAST(day_14_retained AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(cohort_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS day_14_rate
    FROM cohort_size cs
    LEFT JOIN DAY_3 d3 ON cs.cohort_date = d3.cohort_date
LEFT JOIN DAY_7 d7 ON cs.cohort_date = d7.cohort_date
LEFT JOIN DAY_14 d14 ON cs.cohort_date = d14.cohort_date
    ORDER BY cs.cohort_date
    
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 查看核心功能使用用户在3，7，14天三个时间窗口下的留存率
data_quality_warnings: [核心功能用户留存率 3/7/14天] some metric values are NULL — check for division by zero or missing data

charts.sql:
SELECT CAST(rednote_post_num AS INT) as position, COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) as user_count FROM events WHERE span_name ILIKE '%porsche_page%post_card%' AND rednote_post_num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY position ORDER BY position

LIMIT 2000

charts.title: 导航来源

textStyle.fontFamily: 'Inter', 'SF Pro Display', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', 'SF Pro Display', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

charts.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN span_name = 'trival_guide_page_detail_tab_poi_navigation_button_click' THEN '路书详情->导航' WHEN span_name = 'poi_detail_page_navigation_button_click' THEN 'POI详情->导航' ELSE '其他' END as source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM events WHERE span_name IN ('trival_guide_page_detail_tab_poi_navigation_button_click', 'poi_detail_page_navigation_button_click') GROUP BY source ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: 路书详情->导航 & POI详情->导航 这两条导航路径的来源分布，按次数统计

charts.title: POI 详情来源

textStyle.fontFamily: 'Inter', 'SF Pro Display', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', 'SF Pro Display', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

charts.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN referer_page = 'map_view' THEN 'Porsche+地图->POI详情' WHEN referer_page = 'note_detail_page' THEN '帖子->POI详情' WHEN referer_page = 'poi_search_results_p' THEN 'POI搜索->POI详情' ELSE COALESCE(referer_page, '其他') END as source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM events WHERE span_name = 'poi_detail_page_pageshow' AND referer_page IS NOT NULL AND referer_page != '' GROUP BY source ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 2000
charts.description: Porsche+地图->POI详情 & 帖子->POI详情，这两条POI详情页访问路径的来源分布，按次数统计

charts.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN span_name = 'post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide_button_click' THEN '点击生成AI路书' WHEN span_name = 'profile_page_travel_guide_tab_share_code_trip_add_confirm_button_click' THEN '从分享码下载' ELSE '其他' END as source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM events WHERE span_name IN ('post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide_button_click', 'profile_page_travel_guide_tab_share_code_trip_add_confirm_button_click') GROUP BY source ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 2000

charts.title: 点击AI路书生成转化率
charts.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name = 'post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide_button_click') * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name = 'post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide_button_show'), 0) AS ai_guide_conversion_rate FROM events
LIMIT 2000
